india_trends.title: SBI Funds is said to start marketing $1.5 billion IPO next week
india_trends.summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. is preparing to launch its initial public offering as early as next week, aiming to raise up to $1.5 billion. The Indian asset manager plans to allocate roughly three-quarters of the issue to domestic investors and is exploring a pre-IPO placement of up to $350 million.

india_trends.title: India among the worst hit by West Asia crisis, says Gita Gopinath; oil, food and fertilisers all at risk
india_trends.summary: India faces severe economic challenges from the West Asia conflict. Disruptions affect oil, gas, and supply chains. Actual shortages are occurring, not just price hikes. Fertiliser shortages pose a future risk to agriculture and food inflation. India's growth is projected at 6.5%, aided by reduced U

india_trends.title: Silver slides Rs 2,577 to Rs 2.38 lakh/kg in futures trade
india_trends.summary: Silver prices plunged Rs 2,577 to Rs 2.38 lakh per kilogram in the national capital on Friday, tracking weak trends and subdued demand by investors.

india_trends.title: India growth expected to be around 6.5% this year: Gita Gopinath
india_trends.summary: India's economy is projected to grow at 6.5% this year, says Former IMF Deputy Managing Director Gita Gopinath to ET NOW. Global risks, particularly from West Asia, are impacting growth. Inflation is currently managed as companies absorb costs, but this may not last. Food prices could rise if disrup

india_trends.title: Probal Sen flags muted quarter for Reliance as O2C weakness weighs
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries anticipates a subdued earnings report this quarter. The oil-to-chemicals segment faces pressure, impacting overall numbers. While retail and telecom offer stability, energy business challenges are expected to weigh down consolidated performance. Market participants will closely m

india_trends.title: J.P.Morgan downgrades India equities to 'neutral' on oil-led earnings risks, cuts Nifty year-end target by 10%
india_trends.summary: Surging crude prices could stoke inflation and growth risks for the country, squeeze consumption and weigh on near-term corporate margins, with a weakening rupee adding to the pressure, the brokerage said in a note on Friday.

india_trends.title: Waaree Energies shares tumble 5% after US 123% anti-dumping duty shock for Indian solar imports - The Economic Times
india_trends.summary: Waaree Energies shares tumble 5% after US 123% anti-dumping duty shock for Indian solar imports    The Economic Times

india_trends.title: Waaree Energies shares tumble 5% after US 123% anti-dumping duty shock for Indian solar imports
india_trends.summary: Waaree Energies shares fell over 5% after the US imposed preliminary anti-dumping duties of up to 123% on solar imports from India, Indonesia and Laos. The move raises concerns for Indian exporters reliant on the US market, triggering investor worries despite ongoing global demand for renewable ener

india_trends.title: Ralph Lauren, Lanvin double down on India luxury market growth amid global slowdown
india_trends.summary: Ralph Lauren India and Lanvin Group are expanding cautiously but strategically, betting on digital influence and cultural localisation to unlock India’s luxury consumption story.

india_trends.title: Bitcoin dips below $78k amid elevated oil prices; set for 4th weekly rise
Infosys and peers disappoint. Is FY27 IT revenue revival hope a pie-in-the-sky?
india_trends.summary: Weak FY27 revenue guidance, AI-led deflation and macro uncertainty drag Infosys shares to a 52-week low, reinforcing concerns over slowing IT sector growth.

india_trends.title: Himadri Speciality shares rally 13% to fresh record high after Q4 earnings, launch of new facility. Do you own?
india_trends.summary: Himadri Speciality Chemical shares surged to a 52-week high after strong Q4FY26 results and the launch of its first anode material facility in West Bengal. The rally added about Rs 3,500 crore to its market value, taking total market capitalisation to Rs 30,624 crore.

india_trends.title: Expert view: Crude must cool to $70–75 for Nifty 50 to sustain above 25,000, says Shrikant Chouhan of Kotak Securities
india_trends.summary: Shrikant Chouhan from Kotak Securities emphasizes the critical need for crude oil prices to drop to $70–75 per barrel for the Nifty 50 index to maintain momentum beyond 25,000. He advocates for selective investment in large-cap companies amidst ongoing market uncertainties.

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea CEO says company to opt for minor correction in tariff but not structural hike
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea will implement minor adjustments to its mobile tariffs. The company has no immediate plans for a widespread increase in rates. This comes as Bharti Airtel recently raised its prepaid plans. Vodafone Idea is focusing on performance improvement and subscriber growth. The government holds

india_trends.title: India faces 'bad or ugly' macro outcomes from West Asia crisis, says Sanjeev Prasad; but Nifty earnings may hold up
india_trends.summary: India's stock markets are reacting to West Asia news. Sanjeev Prasad of Kotak Institutional Equities warns of significant economic impacts. Two scenarios are presented: a 'bad' outcome with lingering pain and an 'ugly' outcome if conflict persists. Nifty 50 earnings may show resilience due to insula

india_trends.title: Atul Auto ties up with Exponent Energy to develop rapid-charging electric three-wheeler
india_trends.summary: Atul Auto and Exponent Energy are joining forces to create fast-charging electric three-wheelers. The goal is to introduce 15,000 vehicles within three years. Exponent's technology allows batteries to charge in just 15 minutes. This partnership aims to make electric mobility more accessible and affo

india_trends.title: Vedanta Demerger: What ITC Hotels, Tata Motors, Jio Financial signal on listing timeline for Vedanta demerged entities
india_trends.summary: Vedanta Demerger: The share prices of the demerged entities will be derived from the difference between Vedanta Ltd’s closing price on April 29 and its opening price discovered during the SPOS on April 30.

india_trends.title: Sandip Sabharwal sees strength in financials, warns of IT sector headwinds
india_trends.summary: India's top IT firms reported mixed earnings, grappling with near-term pressures and AI-driven structural shifts, leading to subdued growth forecasts. While IT valuations have become more reasonable, market expert Sandip Sabharwal advises caution due to these structural issues. Financials and metals

india_trends.title: Trent’s Q4 shines on growth, margin; demand and cost headwinds in cart now
india_trends.summary: For Trent, store-led growth and margin gains in Q4 offered an earnings lift, but softening demand, rising input costs and rich valuations could test momentum in the coming quarters.
